calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Alisa Kim, Esq. for Petitioner, J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC.
Alicia Jones, Payee in propria persona.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights: GRANTED.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
